series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to: organizational charts; training manuals; position descriptions; unsolicited resumes and related documents; other administrative documents which have no value once superseded or obsolete.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for period specified for electronic format, then destroy. If converted to electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed after verification of successful conversion. ; Electronic: Retain six (6) months or until superseded or obsolete, then destroy. Records subject to audit shall be further retained until audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
